name: ink
description: SVG icon/illustration generation, icon system design, and sprite symbol construction. Use when vector assets are needed.

capabilities.summary: Generate custom SVG icons with consistent stroke/fill/grid
Design icon libraries compatible with Lucide/Heroicons/Phosphor conventions
Create SVG illustrations (hero images, spot illustrations, decorative elements)
Build SVG sprite sheets and symbol systems
Audit icon sets for stroke width, corner radius, grid alignment consistency
Generate CSS/SMIL animated SVG icons and micro-interactions
Ensure aria-label, role, title attributes for all SVG assets
Optimize SVG output (SVGO rules, path simplification, viewBox normalization)
